subject: External component has thrown an exception in M
body:
Hi all,

I have an issue(the error message external component has thrown an 
exception) when I tried to extract unbinned subtomogram with 250 voxel box 
size in M. I imported relion data from 2x binned subtomogram to M. Anyone 
experience similar issue with me? There was an same issue in this forum but 
he resolved his problem using 1.5x binned extraction. I wanna try unbinned 
subtomogram.

Thank you!

Best,
Mingyu
